companies.name: Alludo
companies.reason: Recently discussed due to its expansion in the online education sector with innovative solutions for digital learning. Alludo provides tools aimed at enhancing remote learning experiences, leveraging its history in software development to enable more dynamic educational content.

companies.name: Guild Education
companies.reason: Known for connecting education and workforce development, Guild Education is making headlines with its partnerships with large organizations and educational institutions to provide tailored learning solutions for working adults. Their model emphasizes skill development and reskilling for the modern workforce.

companies.name: Kiddom
companies.reason: Recognized for its K–12 digital curriculum platform, Kiddom is adding AI-powered tools designed to support teachers and enhance learning experiences. The company is positioned as a key player in the growing intersection of education technology and artificial intelligence, addressing contemporary educational challenges.
